title: Junior Business Development Manager at Awfis

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Awfis
jsonLd.description:
Awfis, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Awfis:
Awfis is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Awfis!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
